name: Dispute Resolutions Inc
description_short: San Diego-based credit repair company that disputes errors on credit reports and negotiates with creditors. Bonded, licensed, and registered as a Credit Services Organization.
description_long:
Dispute Resolutions Inc. is a bonded and licensed credit repair service based in San Diego, California, with 35 years of experience in managing credit and collection problems. The company is registered as a Credit Services Organization with the City of San Diego and operates in the greater San Diego area including Rancho Bernardo, Mira Mesa, and North County San Diego.

The company offers personalized credit repair services for individuals and businesses, including disputing wrongful or erroneous credit report listings, credit counseling, budgeting assistance, settlement negotiations, and negotiation of credit extensions or loan contracts. They work directly with creditors, collection agencies, and credit bureaus via telephone, fax, and email to arrange corrections, settlements, and payment plans for bank debts, public records, student loans, and other financial obligations.

Dispute Resolutions Inc. distinguishes itself by emphasizing that it is not a letter-writing service, not a debt-management company, and does not handle customer funds or pay creditor bills directly. They operate on contracts with a maximum six-month duration and position themselves as more affordable than competitors. The company's background includes real estate, property management, and debt collections experience, which they claim informs their negotiation strategies and understanding of creditor relationships.

A key transparency point from their website is the acknowledgment that most services they perform can be done by consumers acting on their own behalf under credit reporting laws and federal/state regulations. This honest caveat is important for consumers to understand: credit repair companies cannot remove accurate negative items from credit reports, only dispute errors and inaccuracies. The company's specific pricing is not detailed on the website, and consumers should request quotes before engaging their services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Bonded and licensed credit repair service registered as a Credit Services Organization in California
35 years of experience in credit and collection management in Southern California
Does not handle customer funds or pay creditor bills directly, reducing financial mismanagement risk
Explicitly states they are NOT a letter-writing service, implying actual direct negotiation with creditors
Offers bundled services including credit repair, counseling, budgeting, and settlement negotiations
Positions itself as more affordable than competitors charging thousands of dollars
Transparent acknowledgment that consumers can perform similar services themselves under existing laws
Six-month maximum contract term limits long-term commitment
cons: Limited service area restricted to San Diego region (San Diego, Rancho Bernardo, Mira Mesa, North County San Diego only)
Specific pricing and cost details not disclosed on website; no transparent fee structure provided
No customer testimonials, case studies, or success metrics published on their website
Website acknowledges that most services can be performed by consumers themselves, raising questions about added value
No information about regulatory compliance records, complaints, or Better Business Bureau ratings provided
best_for: San Diego-area residents with errors or inaccuracies on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance
Business owners in Southern California facing credit challenges or creditor collection issues
Consumers with settled accounts still showing as active or accounts with unrecognized creditors
Individuals seeking bundled credit counseling and budgeting alongside dispute resolution services
diagnosis: Dispute Resolutions Inc. is best suited for San Diego-area residents and businesses seeking professional credit dispute and creditor negotiation services without direct fund handling. The main caveat is that the company's website transparently acknowledges consumers can perform similar work themselves under existing credit laws, so consumers should carefully evaluate whether the professional negotiation expertise justifies the fees before engaging.
services: Disputing wrongful, erroneous, or obsolete credit report listings
Credit report correction and creditor validation of errors
Budgeting assistance and financial decision-making guidance
Settlement negotiations with creditors and collection agencies
Negotiation of credit extensions, purchase contracts, and loan contracts
Direct negotiation with creditors, collectors, and credit bureaus via phone, fax, and email
Resolution of bank debts, public records issues, and student loan problems
Services for both individuals and businesses
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 16776 Bernardo Center Dr 212 B, San Diego, CA 92128
